form.formComment: Second-up. First-up after five months tried to lead throughout but was claimed late 3rd of 9 at Flemington in the LR Moomba Plate on March 28 over 1100m, on a wet track; head behind Thanks Gorgeous carrying 57kg at $31. Previously second-up 2nd of 8 at Flemington 2yo Final on July 5 over 1200m, on a slow track; neck behind Jimmy Recard with 59kg at $2.35. Tried hard fresh in good race, go close here.

formComments.title: TAB

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Raced keenly in the lead in the early stages.
Jumped away awkwardly, shifted in and inconvenienced More Than Hope.

form.formComment: Back from a spell. Finished off last preparation sixth of 9 at Moonee Valley in the G3 Red Anchor Stks October 25 over 1200m, 6 len behind Napoleonic carrying 56.5kg at $17. Previously first up; tenth of 18 at Flemington in the LR Cap D'antibes September 13 over 1100m, 4.5 len behind My Gladiola with 58.5kg at $15. Needs to find best.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Near the 800m, became unbalanced when trailing The Playwright.

form.formComment: Dual acceptor. Second run back. First-up after four months 2nd of 7 at Flemington 3yo Qlty on March 7 over 1100m, 1.3 len behind Legacy Bound carrying 56.5kg at $8. Previously second-up ran on from midfield and scored a big 3.5 len win at Warwick Farm 3yo Mdn August 20 over 1100m in the wet defeating Hush Hush with 58kg at $1.95. Encouraging return and will take plenty of holding out.

formComments.title: TAB

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Laid in under pressure in the straight.

form.formComment: Resuming after a year break. Finished off last preparation eighth of 10 at Randwick in the G1 Sires Prod April 5 2025 over 1400m, 2.5 len behind Vinrock with 56.5kg at $14. On debut second of 9 at Flemington in the LR Festival March 1 2025 over 1000m, 0.8 len behind Shining Smile carrying 57kg at $21. Watch market off a long break.

form.formComment: Dual acceptor. Second-up. First-up after four months favourite; was well back until straightening; raced back then made ground from the turn; won by 0.5 len at Caulfield Heath Bm70 March 18 over 1000m defeating Along The River carrying 58kg at $2.45. Previously second-up favourite; won by 1.0 len at Geelong 3yo C&G Mdn-Sw November 14 over 1207m defeating Tsavo with 58kg at $1.30. Big win fresh and can go again to 1200m.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Equal Class FS(0). Dual acceptor. Second-up. previousStarts.stewardsComment: Raced keenly in the early and middle stages outside the leader.

form.formComment: Third-up today. First-up favourite; raced right near the speed and boxed on; scored a big 5 len win at Ballarat Bm70 February 22 over 1200m defeating Foxenberg with 55.5kg at $1.95. Last start favourite; tracked the speed and boxed on steadily; scored a big 3.5 len win at Caulfield Heath 3yo Bm66 March 18 over 1200m defeating Hotspur Reale carrying 60.5kg at $1.40. Very promising and will be well fancied again.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Began awkwardly and shifted out abruptly

First up last campaign second last of 11 at Moonee Valley in the G3 Champagne September 26 over 1200m, 4.5 len behind Snow Mercy with 56kg at $14. Prefer to see off the break.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Shortly after the start, checked when tightened for room.

form.formComment: At the latest run sat on the pace before fading 8th of 10 at Sandown-Lakeside Bm70 on March 25 over 1200m, slow going 6 len behind Shaime carrying 58kg at $5.50. The race before that raced on the speed and boxed on steadily 2nd of 9 at Murray Bridge Mm 3&4yo on March 7 over 1200m, 2.25 len behind Shadhavar carrying 56kg at $9. Inclined to risk.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Hampered at the start when bumped on the hindquarters by Street Artist.

form.formComment: Second run back. First-up after five months came home strongly from last on the turn; 4th of 9 at this track in the G3 Typhoon Tracy on March 21 over 1200m, 2.5 len behind Point Barrow carrying 56kg at $26. Previously second-up 5th of 11 at this track in the LR Jim Moloney on September 20 over 1400m, 2.75 len behind Yum carrying 56kg at $2.40. Good return, just not sure if she wants further now.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Slow to begin. Raced keenly in the early stages.
Raced keenly in the early and middle stages.
Laid out rounding the home turn.

Slow into stride and then hampered by Macristal House.
